spec_match.rationale: Perfect native spec match utilizing standard textareas, Selection APIs, and mouseup/click events without any simulated layers.

interactive.rationale: User can drag-select or click anywhere in the real text area to instantly stream event logs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully aligned with the Selection Readout description.

edge_cases.rationale: Simple progressive layout where the streamed outputs naturally reveal the browser's execution pipeline to the user without needing complex detection scripts.

references.rationale: Includes the correct ChromeStatus feature link.

design_system.rationale: Clean monospace log window aligning with visual specifications.
